_meta.purpose: Hand-labeled AI maturity ground truth for 25 companies from Crunchbase ODM sample
_meta.methodology: Each company scored 0-3 based on publicly available information: website, job posts, press releases, LinkedIn. Labels reflect actual AI engagement observed, not inferred.

scoring_guide.0: No public signal of AI engagement
scoring_guide.1: Some AI-adjacent activity but no clear AI function
scoring_guide.2: Active AI engagement with multiple signals
scoring_guide.3: Mature AI function with executive commitment

labels.rationale: IT consulting with data analytics focus, some ML tooling mentioned on site
HR tech platform, basic automation but no AI-specific roles or leadership
IT services, no AI signal on website or job posts
Logistics tech, route optimization could use ML but no public signal
Crypto/fintech, basic data analysis but no dedicated AI team
No website found, no public tech signal
